name: sim_rosetta_noncommutativity_ratchet_axis4_convergence

pytorch.reason: load-bearing: compute all four NC measures; verify co-variation; cosine similarity of gradients across frameworks; autograd confirms all four share the same gradient structure

pyg.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

z3.reason: load-bearing: UNSAT proof that NC=0 AND not-in-target is impossible; NC=0 structurally implies A is at the fixed point of the ratchet

cvc5.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

sympy.reason: load-bearing: symbolic derivation that Carnot W_forward - W_reverse = 2*W_net; G-tower NC symbolic form; verify both are non-zero iff out-of-equilibrium

clifford.reason: load-bearing: e12 = e1*e2, e21 = e2*e1 = -e12; NC_clifford = ||e12 - e21||; this is the fundamental non-commutativity; G-tower NC is a matrix-space reflection of it

geomstats.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

e3nn.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

rustworkx.reason: load-bearing: Rosetta graph with four NC nodes + ratchet center; verify all four are instances of ratchet (directed convergence); all four have in-degree from ratchet = Rosetta structure

xgi.reason: load-bearing: 5-way hyperedge encoding the non-commutativity Rosetta claim; the ratchet-as-NC is a 5-way structural relationship

toponetx.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

gudhi.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

P1_gtower_nc_positive_outside_O3.interpretation: G-tower NC > 0 when A not in O(3)

P2_carnot_nc_positive.interpretation: Carnot NC > 0: forward cycle work != reverse cycle work

P3_clifford_fundamental_nc.interpretation: Clifford fundamental NC: e1*e2 != e2*e1; diff = 2*e12

P4_axis4_nc_positive.interpretation: Axis 4 NC > 0: rotation composition is non-commutative

P5_nc_covariation.interpretation: all four NC measures co-vary = same underlying non-commutativity

P6_all_vanish_at_identity.interpretation: all three NC measures vanish at identity/equilibrium simultaneously

P7_sympy_carnot_nc_formula.interpretation: Carnot NC = 2*W_net; zero at equilibrium; symbolic derivation confirms

N1_gtower_nc_zero_for_O3_matrix.interpretation: G-tower NC = 0 when A is identity (in both tower groups); ratchet at base

N2_z3_unsat_nc0_not_in_target.interpretation: UNSAT: impossible for NC=0 while A is outside target group

N3_different_algebraic_forms.interpretation: same structure, different algebraic forms; Rosetta = structural not numerical equality

N4_sympy_different_forms.interpretation: different formulas, same equilibrium structure = Rosetta pattern

N5_commutativity_at_grade_zero.interpretation: NC=0 is realizable at grade-0; the ratchet has a fixed point

B1_small_angle_all_nc_vanish.interpretation: all NC measures -> 0 simultaneously as system approaches identity

B2_rustworkx_rosetta_graph.interpretation: 4 NC nodes all instance_of ratchet = Rosetta convergence structure

B3_xgi_rosetta_hyperedge.interpretation: 5-way hyperedge: all four NC measures and ratchet are co-defined

B4_clifford_grade2_nc_structure.interpretation: NC structure persists at grade-2 = ratchet is not just grade-1

B5_large_angle_nc_exceeds_small.interpretation: NC increases with displacement from identity in both frameworks

rosetta_claim: G-tower NC, Carnot NC, Clifford NC, and Axis 4 NC are four views of the same non-commutativity. The ratchet IS this non-commutativity. All four vanish simultaneously at identity and co-vary under the same transformations.
